mapper.sql:
select rte.type_name , psr.user_info_user_info_id_1 , psr.create_time , psr.request_status_enum_request_status_enum_id_1 , rse.status_name , psr.property_service_request_id , psr.description , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , ui.password , psr.request_type_enum_request_type_enum_id_1 , ui.phone_number , psr.process_progress , ui.username
FROM property_service_request psr left join request_type_enum rte on psr.request_type_enum_request_type_enum_id_1 = rte.request_type_enum_id left join request_status_enum rse on psr.request_status_enum_request_status_enum_id_1 = rse.request_status_enum_id left join user_info ui on psr.user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id
mapper.select:
select rte.type_name , psr.user_info_user_info_id_1 , psr.create_time , psr.request_status_enum_request_status_enum_id_1 , rse.status_name , psr.property_service_request_id , psr.description , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , ui.password , psr.request_type_enum_request_type_enum_id_1 , ui.phone_number , psr.process_progress , ui.username
FROM property_service_request psr left join
request_type_enum
rte on psr.request_type_enum_request_type_enum_id_1 = rte.request_type_enum_id left join
request_status_enum
rse on psr.request_status_enum_request_status_enum_id_1 = rse.request_status_enum_id left join
user_info
ui on psr.user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}
